contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Fastest route: the RFQ form asks the questions we would ask anyway.

inquiryHandoff.title: Fastest route
inquiryHandoff.description: The RFQ form asks the questions we would ask anyway, so we can reply sooner with a quote or only the missing essentials.

need.title: What you are protecting
need.description: Door, garage, driveway, loading dock, perimeter, stock or resale order, or other.

context.title: Dimensions
context.description: Opening width x height or run length, mounting surface or ground type, plus photos or drawings if available.

timing.title: Market and port
timing.description: Quantity, market, delivery port and timeline help us reply within 12 hours — with a quote when details are enough, or only the missing essentials.

panel.emailUnavailable: Use the RFQ form if email is unavailable.
panel.prepareValue: Use the RFQ form; it asks the questions we'd ask anyway.

metadata.title: Request a Quote — Reply Within 12 Hours
metadata.description: Send dimensions, quantities, market and timeline. We reply within 12 hours. If the details are sufficient, the reply includes a quote. Otherwise, we ask only for the missing essentials.

page.heading: Get real numbers
page.intro: Two required fields, one optional message — send what you know and we reply within 12 hours. If the details are sufficient, the reply includes a quote. Otherwise, we ask only for the missing essentials.
page.confidencePricing: No published-price games — the quote is the price conversation

form.messageHint: Optional — share product interest, opening sizes, quantity, delivery country or port, or just say hello.
form.success: Received. We reply within 12 hours. If the details are sufficient, the reply includes a quote. Otherwise, we ask only for the missing essentials. You'll hear from a person, not a sequence.
form.privacyNotice: By submitting this form, you agree to our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.
form.noJsExplanation: The secure inquiry form needs JavaScript because bot verification cannot run without it.

errors.fieldSummary: Please review the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.securitySummary: Security verification did not complete. Please try again.
errors.serverSummary: We could not send your inquiry right now. Please try again shortly.

fullName.tooLong: Full name must be 100 characters or fewer

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address
email.tooLong: Email must be 254 characters or fewer

message.tooLong: Message must be 2000 characters or fewer
